# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
## What's Changed in 0.1.0<!-- RELEASE NOTES START -->

* add Kura to the monorepo by [@pepicrft](https://github.com/pepicrft) in [#10388](https://github.com/tuist/tuist/pull/10388)
### 🐛 Bug Fixes

* wait for all Prometheus nodes in cluster e2e by [@pepicrft](https://github.com/pepicrft) in [#10405](https://github.com/tuist/tuist/pull/10405)
